# DeviceInformationCommand.Command

**Device Management Command**

The command to get detailed information about a device.

## Declaration

```swift
object DeviceInformationCommand.Command
```

## Objects

- **DeviceInformationCommand.Command.Queries**: An array of query dictionaries to get information about a device.
